title: Export_Manager_y_Requisitos_Generales_ERPI
description: File compilation rules (Lineamientos Ch. II + Reglas Generales) and ERPI general registration requirements. This module runs LAST, after all A-E modules are complete.

requisitos_generales_erpi_capitulo_ii.description: Chapter II of the Lineamientos. Documents the ERPI must upload to the SHCP online system. These are separate from the A-E evaluation documents.

ii_1_acta_constitutiva.description: For persona moral: full notarial instrument(s) showing incorporation + any name/denomination changes. Suggest including a free-form letter explaining the chronology of notarizations.

documento_persona_fisica.description: INE, passport, cédula, or residency card with work permit.

acta_constitutiva_completa.description: Must include the ORIGINAL constitutive act. Modifications, transformations, or share purchases are NOT substitutes.

instrumentos_modificatorios.description: All subsequent notarial instruments if name/denomination changed.

escrito_cronologia.description: Recommended: free-form letter explaining the timeline of all notarizations.

ii_2_poder_notarial.description: General power of attorney for acts of dominion OR administration. Must be granted BY the ERPI entity (not by a parent company or individual).

otorgado_por_erpi.description: MUST be granted by the entity that is the ERPI. Other powers are not accepted.

pagina_poder_resaltada.description: Lineamientos recommend highlighting the power clause in a colored box and indicating the page number.

enum: Tarjeta de Residencia Temporal con permiso de trabajo
Tarjeta de Residencia Permanente con permiso de trabajo

ii_4_constancia_situacion_fiscal.description: Current tax status certificate from SAT. Legal name and fiscal address must be current.

razon_social_coincide.description: Must match the ERPI name in the online system and all documents.

registro_sistema_en_linea.description: Registration on the SHCP online system (estimulosfiscales.hacienda.gob.mx).

requiere_efirma.description: Registration is validated through the ERPI's Firma Electrónica Avanzada (e.firma).

reglas_archivos_pdf.description: Technical requirements for all uploaded files.

idioma.description: All documents in Spanish. Foreign-language originals must include original + Spanish translation.

firma.description: Digitized documents may contain autograph or digital signatures.

hipervinculos.const: Libre acceso, sin contraseña, sin solicitar correo electrónico.

sin_portadas_decorativas.description: The Lineamientos explicitly recommend NOT including design covers/title pages on each document, to facilitate review and evaluation.

es_documento_usuario.description: User-uploaded document (contracts, IDs, bank statements, etc.)

alertas_bloqueantes.description: Fatal errors that BLOCK export. Must be resolved before download.

alertas_advertencia.description: Warnings that don't block but should be addressed. Exported with the package.

enrutador_modalidad.description: Branching engine: the app must determine project type at intake and route to the correct schema requirements.

modalidad.description: Each modalidad has different document requirements. 'produccion_nuevo' is the default and most complete. 'postproduccion' replaces screenplay with first cut + written statement. 'previamente_autorizado' requires comparative budgets.

es_coproduccion_internacional.description: If true, activates additional requirements: IMCINE co-production recognition, FX conversion documentation, territorial spend split, pertinence justification in propuesta de producción.
